block_03: A news release is almost always certain to sway the price of a relevant asset. Many traders believe this moment to be the best time to enter the market.
block_04: How do I trade on the news?
block_05: Keep close tabs on upcoming releases with the help of the IQ Option Economic Calendar.
block_07: All of the events on the calendar are conveniently rated based on their market-moving potency and display previous, forecast, and actual levels, helping you to make better-informed decisions at a glance.
block_09: Take a closer look at how the calendar can help you plan a trade:
block_10: There are 2 main strategies for trading on the news:
block_12: Watch for price fluctuations right after the news release. If the actual levels exceed the forecast ones, the relevant asset price tends to go up.
block_13: If the actual levels are lower, the opposite is likely to happen.
block_15: Monitor the price direction the asset took after the news release and watch for the potential formation of a reversal candle.
block_16: Corrective trends can point to an excellent trading opportunity.
block_17: Trading on the news is an essential part of any successful trading strategy. Take the first step towards more predictable and profitable deals.
